introSection: Wild Whizzer is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. The attraction was announced in December 2017 and is located on the Mariner's Landing pier. It opened on June 2, 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a figure-eight shaped layout. The train is propelled by friction wheels.

fullText:
Wild Whizzer is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. The attraction was announced in December 2017 and is located on the Mariner's Landing pier. It opened on June 2, 2018.

The ride has a figure-eight shaped layout. The train is propelled by friction wheels.
